Package logic

Class PlayerInventory

java.lang.Object
logic.PlayerInventory
public class PlayerInventory extends Object
Manages the player's inventory of placeable components (Movers) and handles grid modifications. This class serves as the primary interface for user actions related to placing or removing movers on the game grid.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    PlayerInventory(GameLevel gameLevel)
    Constructs a new PlayerInventory for the given game level.

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayerInventory

      public PlayerInventory(GameLevel gameLevel)
      Constructs a new PlayerInventory for the given game level.
      Parameters:
      gameLevel - The GameLevel this inventory serves.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if there are no available movers in the level.

  • Method Details

    • getCurrentAvailableMovers

      public HashMap<String,Integer> getCurrentAvailableMovers()
      Gets the map of currently available movers and their counts.
      Returns:
      A HashMap of mover names to counts.

    • getCurrentRotation

      public Direction getCurrentRotation()
      Gets the current rotation setting.
      Returns:
      The Direction of rotation.

    • setCurrentRotation

      public void setCurrentRotation(Direction currentRotation)
      Sets the current rotation setting.
      Parameters:
      currentRotation - The new Direction of rotation.

    • getMoverObjectByName

      public static Mover getMoverObjectByName(String name, Direction rotation)
      Creates a Mover object based on its name and rotation.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the mover type (e.g., "CONVEYOR").
      rotation - The initial Direction for the mover.
      Returns:
      A new instance of the specified Mover.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the name is unknown.

    • modifyAvailableMovers

      public void modifyAvailableMovers(String name, int change)
      Modifies the count of available movers in the inventory.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the mover type.
      change - The amount to change the count by (can be negative).
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the name is unknown.

    • setCurrentSelection

      public void setCurrentSelection(String name)
      Sets the currently selected mover type.
      Parameters:
      name - The name of the mover to select, or null to deselect.

    • placeToGrid

      public boolean placeToGrid(GridPos position)
      Attempts to place the currently selected mover onto the grid at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      position - The GridPos where the mover should be placed.
      Returns:
      true if placement was successful, false otherwise.

    • removeFromGrid

      public boolean removeFromGrid(GridPos position)
      Attempts to remove a mover from the grid at the specified position.
      Parameters:
      position - The GridPos to remove the mover from.
      Returns:
      true if removal was successful, false otherwise.

    • getCurrentSelection

      public String getCurrentSelection()
      Gets the current selection name.
      Returns:
      The selection name or null.

    • getInstance

      public static PlayerInventory getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of PlayerInventory.
      Returns:
      The active instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the instance has not been initialized.

    • setInstance

      public static void setInstance(PlayerInventory instance)
      Sets the singleton instance of PlayerInventory.
      Parameters:
      instance - The instance to set.
